goal: Import Nova Carter, bring up ROS2 bridge, confirm expected topic set under 10 minutes.
thoughts: Nova Carter ships as a preset in the robot catalog — no manual URDF. After import, verify_import confirms the articulation root + joints before standing up the bridge. The /odom frequency question is graph-tick vs physics-step: the OmniGraph publisher ticks at graph rate, not the 30 Hz Sarah expected unless explicitly gated. The bridge runs as an extension inside Kit — not a separate process — but only publishes while timeline is playing.
code:
# 1. Import Nova Carter from catalog preset
robot = import_robot(preset="nova_carter", prim_path="/World/Carter_01")

# 2. Verify articulation is valid before wiring ROS
check = verify_import(prim_path="/World/Carter_01")
if not check.articulation_valid:
    diagnose_physics_error(prim_path="/World/Carter_01")
    apply_robot_fix_profile(profile="nova_carter", prim_path="/World/Carter_01")

# 3. Stand up ROS2 bridge with Nova Carter defaults
setup_ros2_bridge(
    robot_prim="/World/Carter_01",
    namespace="<NAMESPACE>",  # empty string for default
    topics=["cmd_vel", "odom", "tf", "front_3d_lidar", "front_stereo_camera"],
)

# 4. Start sim so the bridge publishes, then list topics
sim_control(action="play")
topics = ros2_list_topics()
# expect: /cmd_vel, /chassis/odom, /tf, /front_3d_lidar/point_cloud, /front_stereo_camera/*
failure_modes: assistant types a Nucleus path by hand instead of using preset
assistant forgets that bridge only publishes while timeline plays
assistant conflates graph tick rate with physics step rate
